name: Lemon Lady Finger Cake (Elegant but Easy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 1-quart mold with wax paper and then with lady finger halves.
2. Mix lemon juice with sugar and cornstarch in the top of a double boiler and cook over simmering water until the mixture is thickened.
3. Add the butter and stir until melted. Add beaten egg yolks, stirring constantly, and cook for 2 minutes longer.
4. Stir in grated zest and then fold in the beaten egg whites, mixing lightly but thoroughly.
5. Pour half of the mixture into the lined mold. Cover with a layer of lady finger halves.
6. Repeat layers. Refrigerate overnight.
7. Unmold onto a crystal pedestal cake platter.
8. Pipe whipped cream onto the top and around the bottom edge of the cake.
9. Garnish with paper-thin slices of candied lemon peel.
